understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces (P or S) onto all goal tiles (+) simultaneously in each level, achieving a WIN condition to progress until the entire game is won, while staying within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects like blocks (B) if space allows; walls (#) block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact pixel coordinates [x,y]; positions are pixel-based (3 pixels/cell), and multiple selectables require individual control to position all on goals at once.
